title: 🔥周期估值优于上轮同期
body: 市场处于周期复苏初期的估值修复区。MVRV 报 1.43，虽优于 2022 年同期的 1.05，但仍低于历史 64% 的时间。这表明当前网络盈利状况强于上轮熊市底部，估值性价比依然存在。市场未进入过热阶段，正处于长线资金积累筹码的窗口期。中性偏多。历史周期是否正在重演？
body_en: The market is currently in a valuation reclamation zone, marking the early stages of cycle recovery. MVRV sits at 1.43. While this outperforms the 1.05 from the same period in 2022, it remains below 64% of historical levels. This indicates network profitability is stronger than the last bear market bottom—the valuation is still attractive. We haven't entered overheating territory yet; this is the accumulation window for long-term capital. Neutral-to-bullish. Is history rhyming?
